---
title: "trigger_accounts"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(reticulate)

# Use venv Python ~/.venv/pytrigger
use_python("~/.venv/pytrigger/bin/python", required = TRUE)
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from trigger import TriggerDB

with TriggerDB() as db:
    accounts = (
        db.from_("accounts")
          .select("email", "id", "created_at", "last_login")
          .where(id=">=0")       
          .order_by("id")        
          .asc()
          .limit(10000)
          .fetch()
    )

accounts = pd.json_normalize(accounts)
```

```{r}
accounts <- reticulate::py$accounts
```
